extraction.one_line_summary: CHIMA Damiano won from a breakaway that held off the peloton by meters after DENZ Nico forced premature attacks inside 3km.
tactical_patterns: DENZ Nico attacking solo under 5km fragmented breakaway cooperation, allowing peloton to close gap critically before final kilometer.
Bora-Hansgrohe and Israel Cycling Academy abandoned chase inside 3km, revealing teams prioritized GC safety over sprinter investment late race.
CHIMA exploited DENZ leading out final 250m by sitting rightside position, converting tactical error into stage win against arriving sprinters.

rider_signals.CIMA Damiano: positive: won from 500km+ cumulative breakaway time this Giro, suggesting exceptional recovery between stages for multi-day efforts
rider_signals.DENZ Nico: negative: forced to lead out final sprint after solo move under 5km, tactical impatience cost him stage against weaker sprinters
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: positive: finished second despite peloton closing 4min gap in final 32km, showing sprint form despite team chase abandonment
rider_signals.CONSONNI Simone: neutral: third place confirms ability to contest reduced bunch sprints but lacked positioning to challenge late-arriving sprint
